# Check agent position
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# From rows 26-30, cols 14-18, let's try moving RIGHT
# Looking at the maze, rows 26-30, cols 20-24 might be white passages
# But rows 26-30, cols 25-31 might be black walls
# Let me check the ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRows 26-31, cols 13-42:")
for i in range(26, 32):
    row = ""
    for j in range(13, 42):
        ch = ascii_lines[i][j]
        if ch == 'W':
            row += '.'
        elif ch == 'B':
            row += '#'
        elif ch == 'R':
            row += 'R'
        elif ch == 'b':
            row += '@'
        else:
            row += '?'
    print(f"Row {i:2d}: {row}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
